title: Asian Art Museum Transfers Ownership of 13 Objects to Cambodia
highlights: — The Asian Art Commission, governing body of the Asian Art Museum of San Francisco, has unanimously approved the return of 13 Khmer artworks to Cambodia after a formal request from the Cambodian government and a joint review with U.S. Homeland Security Investigations. A preliminary agreement with the Cambodian Ministry of Culture and Fine Arts allows for the objects to remain at the Asian Art Museum on extended loan,  ... (New York, July 2, 2024)—The Metropolitan Museum of Art announced today that it is physically returning to the care of Cambodia 14 sculptures that the Museum deaccessioned last year.
